exp_D.bytecode:
# FLUX Bytecode for Storm Avoidance Program

```
0x00  ; NOP - Start with no operation (optional)

; Initialize storm detection threshold (let's assume 50 is the danger level)
0x10 0x00 0x32    ; MOVI R0, 50   - Set storm threshold in R0

; Main monitoring loop
0x90 0x01         ; GAUGE R1      - Read current storm level into R1
0x40 0x01 0x00    ; CMP R1, R0    - Compare current level (R1) with threshold (R0)
0x41 0x0E         ; JE 0x0E       - If equal, jump to alert sequence

; If not dangero
```
